description: Horizons Patch 3 (4 December 2024) — Albion Journal Mission change, HUD Editor improvements, Dynamic Encampments Lair Map change, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Daggers, Frost Staffs, Holy Staffs, War Gloves, Helmets, Armors, Shoes, Potions, Misc), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes and Improvements
items: Journal mission: 'Collect 20 offspring in 10 minutes on a single island' → 'Have offspring from 10 different animals'
HUD Editor: Default Spells and Transformation Spells are now always displayed; Vanity Spells switch to default spells while HUD Editor is open
Dynamic Encampments: Lair Maps in Solo Encampments are now hidden until the Encampment's objective has been completed, then become visible to all players (Group Encampments unaffected)
[Mobile] Adjusted Custom Button Slot hotkey assignments: 'Recording Mode,' 'Walk Up/Down/Right/Left' removed; 'World Map' and 'Destiny Board' can now be assigned
sections.searchable_text: Changes Journal mission offspring animals HUD Editor Default Spells Transformation Vanity Dynamic Encampments Lair Maps Solo objective Group Mobile Custom Button Slot hotkey World Map Destiny Board

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Frazzle reduces enemy defenses before damage 103.11 125

changes.raw_text: Frazzle: Now reduces enemy defenses before dealing damage. Damage: 103.11 → 125.
notes: Now reduces enemy defenses before dealing damage

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Ice Storm Glacial Staff Cast time 1s 0.5s Stand time 0.5s 0.3s Travel distance 18m 12m 1.2m/s 0.8m/s

changes.raw_text: Ice Storm: Cast time: 1s → 0.5s; Stand time: 0.5s → 0.3s; Travel distance: 18m → 12m (1.2m/s → 0.8m/s)

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sacred Pulse Stand time 0.5s 0.3s

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Counter 75% defense buff duration 1.2s 2s Earth Crusher Ravenstrike Cestus not reflectable 0.5s 179 175 1s 190 185 1.5s 202 195 2s 214 205

changes.raw_text: Counter: 75% defense buff duration: up to 1.2s → always 2s
Earth Crusher: No longer reflectable. 0.5s Charge-up: 179 → 175; 1s Charge-up: 190 → 185; 1.5s Charge-up: 202 → 195; 2s Charge-up: 214 → 205.

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Ballista Support Fire Royal Helmet Cooldown 40s 30s

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Dynamic Defense Jacket of Tenacity 20% bonus damage opponents weapon 10% all damage types

changes.raw_text: Dynamic Defense: 20% bonus damage based on opponent's weapon → 10% bonus to all damage types

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Focused Run Scholar Sandals Energy per tick 2.63 4 max 26.3 40 Vengeful Sprint Demon Boots Cooldown 40s 30s

subsections.heading: Potions
subsections.searchable_text: Potions Acid Potion armor magic resistance 50% Cleansing Potion 30% movement speed CC debuffs removed Hellfire Potion 35% healing reduction 3s true damage 25% Cooldown 60s 90s Sticky Potion damage reduction 50% Tornado in a Bottle Radius 3m 4m Cooldown 90s 60s

changes.raw_text: Acid Potion: Increased armor and magic resistance reduction by 50%
notes: Increased armor and magic resistance reduction by 50%

changes.raw_text: Cleansing Potion: Added 30% movement speed buff for the duration of immunity only if CC or debuffs are removed
notes: Added 30% movement speed buff for the duration of immunity, only if CC or debuffs are removed

changes.raw_text: Hellfire Potion: Added 35% healing reduction for 3s to all targets hit; Increased true damage to players and mobs by 25%; Cooldown: 60s → 90s
notes: Added 35% healing reduction for 3s to all targets hit
Increased true damage to players and mobs by 25%

changes.raw_text: Sticky Potion: Increased damage reduction by 50%
Tornado in a Bottle: Radius: 3m → 4m; Cooldown: 90s → 60s

subsections.heading: Misc
subsections.searchable_text: Misc Deflecting Spin Spears no longer stops moving Mimic Arcane Staffs no longer queues auto-attacks

changes.raw_text: Deflecting Spin: No longer stops moving on usage
notes: No longer stops moving on usage

changes.raw_text: Mimic: No longer queues auto-attacks after casting
notes: No longer queues auto-attacks after casting

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where spells that activate at a certain health threshold would not be triggered by damage from potions
Fixed issue where mounting up immediately after casting an invisibility spell would not break the invisibility
Mend Wounds (all Armors): Fixed issue where it would sometimes override movement commands
Fixed issue where Morgana Occultists in the Mists would not spawn bats after using their instant ability
Fixed issue where search filters would reset after switching tabs in the Marketplace UI
Fixed issue where clicking a loadout shared in chat would also move the character to the clicked position
Fixed issue where the Building Management UI of some tiers of Guild Halls and Houses could not be opened while inside
[Mobile] Fixed issue where selected emotes in Key Bindings settings would reset when selecting a Custom Button Slot
[Mobile] Fixed issue where the on-screen keyboard obstructed the Loadouts dropdown in the Marketplace UI
Fixed issue where static Randomized Dungeon entrances in the Roads of Avalon would not be visible
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
